[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101100 3
1 11111100 6
2 01001001 3
3 00111100 4
4 00000000 a
5 01101000 3
6 01000000 1
7 10110111 6

01 11111111 a

23 10110111 6 match 7
